Bug / Task Description: Three related correctness and performance fixes in the gossip stack. (1) In pkg/gossip, cache the StateStore hash so repeated Hash() calls with no intervening mutation return the same cached value, and invalidate that cache on Put, Apply, and Delete so the hash changes after each mutation. (2) In pkg/hash, fix Ring.TransferKeys so it has no side effects on the ring: it must not permanently add the probed node and must leave the ring size unchanged. (3) In pkg/clock, make vector-clock comparison allocation-free without altering its comparison results. Preserve existing public APIs and hashing semantics.
Commit Subject: fix(perf): add state hash caching, allocation-free vector compare, fix TransferKeys side-effect
